name: Asset Servicing NAV
description: Returns net asset value and as-of date for a fund. NOTE: This agent is keyed by fund_id, NOT relationship_id. It is intentionally NOT selected by relationship-level hero prompts, demonstrating the resolver's selectivity — it will only be chosen when the user explicitly requests NAV for a specific fund.

skills.name: get_nav
skills.description: Retrieve the net asset value and valuation date for a specific fund identified by fund_id.
examples: net asset value of the fund
